meta.title: DEF CON 29 HHV -  rehr -  Walkthrough of DC28 HHV Challenge Solutions
meta.description: Last year we (the HHV) released a series of hardware hacking challenges for DEF CON attendees to solve during the conference (and after). Many attempted the challenges, but only a few (3) solved all 5! Join us as we will walk through how to solve all 5 of the DC 28 HHV challenges, and attempt to demystify the world of hardware hacking. We may even drop a hint or two for this years’ challenges.
